---
title: "Bad Cams - No road overlap"
format:
    html:
        code-fold: true
jupyter: python3
---
The following cameras were detected to not intersect with a road. Likely due to incorrect distance from the road or tagged with an incorrect direction. Some ALPRs along straight stretches of road, which have a large distance between nodes show up incorrectly.   

:::{.column-page-right}  

::: {.panel-tabset}
## Map
```{python}
import pandas as pd
import geopandas as gpd
import folium
import itables
from datetime import datetime
noxgdf = gpd.read_file("../../../osmbadcams/nointersect.gpkg")
noxgdf = noxgdf.rename({"STUSPS":"State", "NAME":"State Full", "osmid":"ID", "url":"URL"}, axis=1)

noxgdf.explore(popup=True, style_kwds={"weight":9,"color":"#9E2F02","opacity":0.8,"fillOpacity":0.5})

```
## Table
```{python}
itables.show(pd.DataFrame(noxgdf.drop(["geometry"], axis=1)),  maxBytes=200000, allow_html=True)
```  
:::  

:::  

Started with 3,206 datapoints on 2026-05-15 , which represented around 3.3% of all the ALPR data at the time.  
Last updated: `{python} datetime.today().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")`
